title: SCP: Unloaded
description: SCP: Unloaded is a mod that adds mostly obscure SCP's to it!
body:
# SCP UNLOADED

SCP unloaded is my addition to the scp mod community! Inside you can find many SCP! All of them ready for you to contain! Unlike most SCP mods I made it so you can find the SCP in the world and you contain them.

**Current plans**

- Adding more SCP
- Adding new decorative blocks
- Structures?
  

-----

**Current SCP List**

**SCP-839 "Candied Worms"**

**SCP-1162 "Hole in the wall"**

-----

**Coming Soon SCP List**

**SCP-939 "With Many Vocies"** -COMING IN HEAVY CONTAINMENT UPDATE-

**SCP-111 "Dragon Snails"**

**SCP-745 "The Headlights"**

**SCP-1104 "Nose Crabs"**

**SCP-173 "The Statue"** -COMING IN HEAVY CONTAINMENT UPDATE-

**SCP-049 "The Plague Doctor"** -COMING IN HEAVY CONTAINMENT UPDATE-

**And many many more!**
-----
